snippet.title: Hellallallo Video | Peddi (TELUGU) | Ram Charan | Buchi Babu | Shruthi Haasan | Janhvi | AR Rahman
snippet.description:
Presenting the Official Video of "Hellallallo" from the film "PEDDI".

Releasing in cinemas worldwide on 4th June. #GetReadyForPeddi 💥💥

Song Name: Hellallallo (Telugu)
Music  A R Rahman 
Lyrics  Ananth Sree Ram 
Singer  Rakshita Suresh 
Music Supervisor Prashanth Venkat 
Project Manager Karthik Sekaran 
Rhythm Kalyan 
Additional Programmers Prashanth Venkat, Suryansh 
Vocal Producers Sarat Santhosh, Suryansh 
Sound engineers  Panchathan Record Inn, Chennai  
Senior Engineers : Suresh Permal, Karthik Sekaran 
Assistant Engineers : Sathish V Saravanan, Bharath Arjunan 
Song Mixed and Mastered by  Pradeep Menon 
Dolby Music Mix and Technical Lead Riyasdeen Riyan 
Musicians Co Ordinators Samidurai R, Abdul Haiyum

Cast: Mega Power Star Ram Charan, Janhvi Kapoor, Shiva Rajkumar, Jagapathi Babu, Divyendu Sharma, Shruthi Haasan

Music: A R Rahman
Written & Directed by: Buchi Babu Sana

Technical Crew:
Presents: Mythri Movie Makers, Sukumar Writings
Banner: Vriddhi Cinemas
Producer: Venkata Satish Kilaru
Co-Producer: Ishan Saksena

Production Design: Avinash Kolla
Executive Producer: V. Y. Praveen Kumar
VFX Supervisor: Sanath PC
Sound Design: Raghunath Kemisetty
Marketing: First Show
PRO: Vamsi-Shekar

snippet.title: Chunnari Chunnari - Let’s Go | Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai |Varun,Mrunal,Pooja| In Cinemas 5th June
snippet.description:
🔥 Get ready to groove to the ultimate dance song of the year — Chunnari Chunnari - Let’s Go! 💃✨
From the much-awaited Bollywood entertainer Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai, this electrifying track brings back the iconic 90s vibe with a fresh party twist! 🎶❤️

With peppy beats, colorful energy, and vocals that will make you hit repeat, this song is all set to rule your playlists and dance floors! 🕺🔥

Stay updated with the latest videos from Tips Official, Subscribe on the below link.
http://youtube.com/tipsofficial

Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai
Releasing In Cinemas Worldwide on 5th June 2026

Song Credits : 
Song Title: Chunnari Chunnari - Let’s Go!
Music Composer: Akshay & IP
Additional Lyrics: IP Singh
Singers: IP Singh, Jonita Gandhi, Asees Kaur, Sudhir Yaduvanshi, Anuradha Sriram
Music Produced & Arranged: Akshay Raheja, Abhishek Singh
Guitars: Chaitanya Bhaidkar
Mix & Master: Abhishek Ghatak
Original Music: Anu Malik
Original Lyrics: Sameer Anjaan
Director Of Choreography: Remo D'souza

Movie Details: 
Tips Films Ltd Presents
Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai
Directed By David Dhawan
Produced By Ramesh Taurani
Cast: Varun Dhawan, Mrunal Thakur, Pooja Hegde, Maniesh Paul, Chunky Pandey, Jimmy Shergill, Mouni Roy
Co-Producer: Gaurav Bose (Maximilian Films UK)
DOP: Ayananka Bose
Story & Screenplay Writer: Yunus Sajawal
Dialogue Writer: Farhad Samji
Music: White Noise Collectives, Tanishk Bagchi, Rony Ajnali, Gill Macchrai (Classy Beats), Javed - Mohsin, Akshay & IP
Lyrics: Vayu, Jairaj, Mohsin Shaikh, Rony Ajnali & Gill Macchrai (Classy Beats), IP Singh
Director Of Choreography: Remo D'souza, Bosco Martis, Vijay Ganguly
Editor: Ritesh Soni
Head Of Production: Varsha Taurani
Production Designer: Late Rajat Poddar & Parijat Poddar
Action Director: Sunil Rodrigues

Sound Recording & Sound Design:  Parikshit Lavani & Kunal Mehhta (CSD Studio)
Background Score Raju Singh
Costume Designer Aki Narula, Samidha Wangnoo
Associate Producer Prakash Talreja
Executive Producer Sushil Tirwadkar
Line Producer Sudipto (Sid) Sarkar (UK)
Associate Director Aakar Kauoshik
Associate Editor: Sanket Rajadhyaksha
Re-Recording Mixer: Justin Jose K (Cas)
Casting Director Mukesh Chhabra (Csa) & Rachita Kapoor (UK)
Di Studio : Redefine
Di Colourist Ashirwad Hadkar (Isc)
Vfx Do It Creative Ltd (UK)
Post Producer Murli Shah
Publicity Design: Parass Kanani (  House Of AWE)
Media Consultant : Nilufer Qureshi (Hype)

Marketing Consultant:  Yash Suchak & Suraj Rao (Grey Alchemy)
Digital Agency: White Rivers Media
Visual Promotions Ma & Th (Marching Ants & Trigger Happy)
UK Production Maximilian Films Ltd. 

Lyrics : 
Chunari-Chunari
 
Saari Raen Din
Saara Chaen Mera
Hosh Tabiyat Lutt Ke Lae Gayi,
 
Udti Jaaye Banke Patang,
Kar Mujhko Tang Ye Kya Hai Keh Gayi,
 
Lehraaye Besharmi Se
Tadpaaye Berehmi Se
Chhoo Loon Tu Kehde Jo Zaraa.
 
Aaja Na Chhoo Le Meri Chunari Sanam
Kuchh Na Main Bolun Tujhey Meri Qasam.
 
Aaya Deewaana Darr Pe Tere
Tere Bin Kya Karoon Bataa De Bereham.
 
Mhare Dil Mein Bajee Pichkari,
Rangi Main Poori Thaari Sajna,
Teri Choonar Manay Samjhaa Ri,
Ke Ho Gi Tu Hai Mhaari Sajnaa.

#chunnarichunnari #haijawanitohishqhonahai #VarunDhawan #MrunalThakur #PoojaHegde #anumalik #akshay #ipsingh #jonitagandhi #aseeskaur #sameeranjaan #dancesong #bollywoodsongs #HJTIHH #bollywoodnewmovies

snippet.title: Ghis Ghis Ghis | Welcome to the Jungle | Akshay Kumar, Akshara Singh | Vikram Montrose | 26th June
snippet.description:
Presenting the ultimate collaboration of the year, Bollywood Khiladi Akshay Kumar teams up with the undisputed queen of Bhojpuri cinema, Akshara Singh. 🔥🎶 Ghis Ghis Ghis from 'Welcome to the Jungle' sung by Vikram Montrose and Supriya Pathak, with catchy lyrics by Abhinav Shekhar, is not just a song; it’s a high-octane Bollywood-Bhojpuri celebration packed with desi swag, electrifying energy, and nonstop entertainment.

#GhisGhisGhis #AkshayKumar #AksharaSingh #WelcomeToTheJungle #BollywoodSong #BollywoodDanceSong #BhojpuriSong #BhojpuriDanceSong #PartySong #DanceSong #BollywoodNewSong

en.title: Ghis Ghis Ghis | Welcome to the Jungle | Akshay Kumar, Akshara Singh | Vikram Montrose | 26th June
en.description:
Presenting the ultimate collaboration of the year, Bollywood Khiladi Akshay Kumar teams up with the undisputed queen of Bhojpuri cinema, Akshara Singh. 🔥🎶 Ghis Ghis Ghis from 'Welcome to the Jungle' sung by Vikram Montrose and Supriya Pathak, with catchy lyrics by Abhinav Shekhar, is not just a song; it’s a high-octane Bollywood-Bhojpuri celebration packed with desi swag, electrifying energy, and nonstop entertainment.

snippet.description:

Manoj Bajpayee brings to life the untold story of the brave unsung hero who saved India from bankruptcy.

snippet.title: HAMDAM (Official Music Video) - Hesham Abdul Wahab, Hanan Shaah, Shafi Kollam, HarisSaleem, Zakariya
snippet.description:
“Between prayers and memories, there lives a Hamdam”.

Celebrate this Bakrid with "HAMDAM," a grand audio-visual anthem from Aachus Production that beautifully bridges traditional festive warmth with modern global sounds to deliver a powerful message of peace, love, and togetherness.

Composed and performed by Hesham Abdul Wahab, the track features the soulful vocals of Hanan Shaah, moving Malayalam lyrics by Shafi Kollam, and an energetic English rap verse by veteran artist Haris Saleem (Street Academics). Bringing this melody to life on screen is award-winning filmmaker Zakariya in his music video directorial debut, transforming "HAMDAM" into a stunning, cinematic celebration of community.

Listen to HAMDAM: https://tuneabl.com/stream-hamdam

Music Credits:
Song Composed, Arranged and produced by Hesham Abdul wahab 
Singers: Hesham Abdul Wahab, Hanan Shaah, Shafi Kollam
Rap performed and written by Haris Saleem (Street Academics) 
Additional Vocals: Ayshath Safa and Vichuuuh

Bouzouki, Mandolin, Oud, Rabab, Saz: Tapas Roy

Aalamin Noorala
Aayoree Ponpira
Souminte Thoufayayi
Shawwal Vannitha
Paraaake Thakbeerayi
Shukur Sheelukal

Ee Perunal Ee Perunal
Irayonekum Eidin Haal

Ummathe Musthafa
Thedalil Ee Kripa
Jannathin Chelitha
Ahalore Cherkkunee
Khalb Hubbilu

Ee Perunal Ee Perunal
Irayonekum Eidin Haal

Haqqayathonnalle
Dikkethumavanille
Okkeyum Porulalle
Nikkatha Nooralle
Kittabakathalle
Thakkol Meemalle
Thirayunna Neralle
Thiriyathe Povalle

Kadalinte Oolangal
Katha Chollum Ee Yathrayeee

Kadalinte Aazham Kadannu 
Muthonneduth Poranam
Ath Ninte Roohinte Sirr 
Marayunnidath Mochanam
Praanante Naathane 
Sarwa Saanthwanam

Celebrate, celebrate  feel the joy inside,
Side by side, let the good vibes ride.
Unity strong, bringing hearts together,
Eid day love gonna last forever.
Celebrate, celebrate  smiles everywhere,
Peace in the air like a whispered prayer.
From home to home let the kindness flow,
This is the light that we all can show.

Haqqayathonnalle
Dikkethumavanille
Okkeyum Porulalle
Nikkatha Nooralle

Ithayam Nirayum Muhabbin Kol
Kasavin Azhakil Kissayum Chel

en.title: HAMDAM (Official Music Video) - Hesham Abdul Wahab, Hanan Shaah, Shafi Kollam, HarisSaleem, Zakariya
en.description:
“Between prayers and memories, there lives a Hamdam”.

Celebrate this Bakrid with "HAMDAM," a grand audio-visual anthem from Aachus Production that beautifully bridges traditional festive warmth with modern global sounds to deliver a powerful message of peace, love, and togetherness.

Composed and performed by Hesham Abdul Wahab, the track features the soulful vocals of Hanan Shaah, moving Malayalam lyrics by Shafi Kollam, and an energetic English rap verse by veteran artist Haris Saleem (Street Academics). Bringing this melody to life on screen is award-winning filmmaker Zakariya in his music video directorial debut, transforming "HAMDAM" into a stunning, cinematic celebration of community.

Listen to HAMDAM: https://tuneabl.com/stream-hamdam

Music Credits:
Song Composed, Arranged and produced by Hesham Abdul wahab 
Singers: Hesham Abdul Wahab, Hanan Shaah, Shafi Kollam
Rap performed and written by Haris Saleem (Street Academics) 
Additional Vocals: Ayshath Safa and Vichuuuh

Bouzouki, Mandolin, Oud, Rabab, Saz: Tapas Roy 
Bulbul: Kishore Mohite 
Guitars and Bass: Sumesh Parameswar

Rhythms Recorded by Kittu Meykal assisted by Vivek at Soundideaz Studios, Mumbai

Mix Assisted by Santom Jose & Azhar Thaju 
Recording Studios: HW Studio - Kochi, Soundideaz Studios - Mumbai, NeoSound Studio - Mumbai

HW Sessions Managed by Vichuuuh Praboa. 
Artist Management: Kishor Chokappan 

Audio Digital Partner: TUNE.ABL
Tune.Abl Team: Irfan Erooth, Ashbin Paulson 

Special Thanks to Ayshath Safa

snippet.title: Mango Pachcha - Official Trailer | Sanchith | Viveka | KRG Studios | Supriyanvi
snippet.description:
For more latest songs & videos, subscribe 👉 https://bit.ly/Saregama_Kannada

From the streets of Mysore to the shadows behind power,
a story filled with emotions, chaos, family, politics & rebellion is ready to unfold🔥

Supriyanvi Picture Studios and KRG Studios proudly present the official trailer of Mango Pachcha
Introducing Sanchit Sanjeev — a fresh talent stepping into cinema with fire, intensity and honesty filled with emotion, rage, innocence and madness — making a striking debut on the big screen.

“People with power win wars.
People with willpower build empires.”

Mysuru 2001-02: Mango Pachcha chronicles the saga of loyalty, deceit and power spanning over a decade on a local empire.

Movie Credits:
Producers: Priya Sudeep, Karthik & Yogi G Raj
Director: Viveka
Written by: Viveka, Nagbhushan Deshpande
Cast: Sanchith Sanjeev, Kajal Kunder, Prashanth Hiremath, Mayur Patel, Jai , Harini Shreekanth, Hamsa Narayanaswamy, Ugramm Manju
Executive Producers: MT Sriram, Abhijith KB
DOP: Shekar Chandra, Swami, 
Music Director: Charan Raj
Editor: Sharath Vashisht
Art Director: Vishwas Kashyap
Sound Designer: Sreesan G
Final Mixing- Jaison Jose & Daniel Jefferson 
Chief Associate Director: Nagbhushan Deshpande
Direction team: Ananya U S, Daniel Raj E, Dhanush K.R, Dr. Rashmith. Prasanna Kumar, Lokesh O, Prashanth Gowda
Camera team: Mariswamy, Madhusudan B R, Sai Raghavendra K, Umesh
Action Director: Dr.K. Ravi Verma, Arjun Raj Real Satish.
Chief Art Associate: Raghavendra Rao
Makeup Chief: Ismail(Mysore) 
Stylist: Yogi G Raj
Chief Costumer: Lakshminarayana(Nani) 
Colorist: Ashik Kusugolli
Online Editor: Sohan Kalaburgi
VFX studios: Fortune FX
Production Manager: Sudhir K M
Prosthetic Make up- Priyanka Sarmacharjee 
Marketing Team: Anil Anirudh, Chethan Nanjundaiah, Bindushree, Vishruth G, Roopa Achar, Rahul R , Priyanka Shivaganga
PRO: Pink Tickets & Harish Arasu
Publicity Design: Deekshith Sagar
Subitles-Samarth Madhusudan Rao

Trailer Music Credits:
All tracks Composed, Arranged and Produced by Charan Raj
Vocals – Deepak blue,Charanraj, Shenbagaraj, Shridhar Ramesh, Sugandh Sekar, Vignesh Raj, Aniket Mohanty 
Music producers - Charanraj, Sujith Sreedhar and Bhuvanesh
Guitars - Sunil Silvester and Godfray Immanuel
Trumpet - Vijay
Percussion - Karthik Vamshi 
Recording Engineers - Vishnu Raj, Kashyap Rammohan

snippet.title: Khesari Lal Yadav New Song | Ahir Ke Dimaag -Teaser | Shilpi Raj | Ft Kajal Kashyap | New Song
snippet.description:
Khesari Lal Yadav aur Shilpi Raj ka naya bhojpuri gana 2026, Ahir Ke DImag / अहीर के दिमाग ka Rangdari bhojpuri new song Teaser aa gaya! 🔥 Ye ek fresh Khesari lal Yadav ka Rangdaari bhojpuri new song hai Khesari Lal Yadav aur Kajal Kashyap ki jodi ne is bhojpuri gana ko next level par pahuncha diya hai, aur yeh definitely trending list  mein top par hoga. 
🎬 Full song exclusively release hoga IVY Bhojpuri Dhamaka par
⏰ Full Song Release: 27 May 2026, at 6 AM

Teaser sirf ek jhalak ba… asli dhamaka abhi baaki ba

SINGERS : KHESARI LAL YADAV & SHILPI RAJ
FEAT : KAJAL KASHYAP
MUSIC : KANHA SINGH
LYRICS : KRISHNA BEDARDI

Khesari Lal Yadav Fans aur Khesari Army, taiyar ho jaiye saal ke sabse bada rangdari dhamaka ke liye 🔥
Ahir Ke DImag / अहीर के दिमाग teaser ab out ho chuka ba aur full song 27 May Subah 6 Baje release hote hi YouTube par trend kare wala ba.

💥 Agar aap asli Khesari fan bani to abhi video ko Like 👍 kari, Share 📲 kari aur Channel ko Subscribe 🔔 kari.

🚨 Comment me likhiye — Khesari Bhaiya Trend Kara Di
🔥 Har Bhojpuri aur Khesari Army fan tak is teaser ke pahunchaiye.

· ব্যবসায়িক ইমেল - bemohitverse@gmail.com

০০:১৫ কেন সাদা-কালো স্পাইডার-নোয়ার নেই তার ব্যাখ্যা...

০৪:১৯ দেব প্যাটেলের পরবর্তী A24 ভারতীয় চলচ্চিত্র...
০৪:৪৩ প্যাশন অফ দ্য ক্রাইস্ট সিক্যুয়েলের ফার্স্ট লুক

০৫:৩৮ রেসিডেন্ট ইভিল স্পেশাল সিনেমাটোগ্রাফি
০৬:০৮ টমি শেলবির ছেলের ফার্স্ট লুক...

আমাকে অনুসরণ করুন 
· ইনস্টাগ্রাম - https://www.instagram.com/comicverseyt/
· এক্স - https://x.com/comicverseyt

দাবিত্যাগ: - এই চ্যানেল কোনো অবৈধ কার্যকলাপকে প্রচার বা উৎসাহিত করে না। এই চ্যানেলের সমস্ত বিষয়বস্তু শুধুমাত্র শিক্ষামূলক এবং তথ্যমূলক উদ্দেশ্যে তৈরি। 

কপিরাইট দাবিত্যাগ: - কপিরাইট আইন ১৯৭৬-এর ১০৭ ধারা অনুযায়ী, সমালোচনা, মন্তব্য, সংবাদ প্রতিবেদন, শিক্ষাদান, বৃত্তি এবং গবেষণার মতো উদ্দেশ্যে ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের (FAIR USE) অনুমতি দেওয়া হয়েছে। ন্যায্য ব্যবহার হলো কপিরাইট আইন দ্বারা অনুমোদিত একটি ব্যবহার, যা অন্যথায় লঙ্ঘনকারী হতে পারে। অলাভজনক, শিক্ষামূলক বা ব্যক্তিগত ব্যবহার ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের পক্ষে ভারসাম্য রক্ষা করে।

চ্যানেল ডিসক্লেইমার – কমিকভার্স হলো একটি পপ কালচার কমেন্টারি ও ফিল্ম রিভিউ চ্যানেল, যা ফ্যান থিওরি, ফিল্ম, ওয়েব সিরিজ এবং ট্রেলার রিভিউয়ের জন্য উৎসর্গীকৃত। কমিকভার্স চ্যানেল মাঝে মাঝে ফিল্ম, ওয়েব সিরিজ, ট্রেলার এবং গান সম্পর্কে ব্যাখ্যা করার জন্য ফিল্ম ক্লিপ, টিভি সিরিজ ক্লিপ, ওয়েব সিরিজ ক্লিপ, অ্যানিমেশন সিরিজ ক্লিপ ব্যবহার করে থাকে, কিন্তু কপিরাইট আইন ১৯৭৬-এর ১০৭ ধারা অনুযায়ী সমালোচনা, মন্তব্য, সংবাদ প্রতিবেদন, শিক্ষাদান, বৃত্তি এবং গবেষণার মতো উদ্দেশ্যে ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের (ফেয়ার ইউজ) অনুমতি দেওয়া হয়।

snippet.title: REAL STRUGGLE (Official Music Video) | Dharampreet & Kuldeep Rasila | New Punjabi Song 2026
snippet.description:
LUCKY MANILA & KULDEEP RASILA PRESENTS

🎬 REAL STRUGGLE – Official Music Video


Life is not always easy. Behind every smile, every dream, and every success, there is a story of sacrifice, pain, hard work, and struggle. “REAL STRUGGLE” is a Punjabi track dedicated to those people who keep fighting their battles silently and never give up.
This song reflects the reality of life, emotions, and the journey that many people experience while chasing their dreams. If you have ever faced difficult times, this song is for you.


✨ Watch the full video and feel the emotion behind every word.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

💫 Song Credits:
🎤 Singer: Dharampreet & Kuldeep Rasila
🎼 Music: Still Music
✍️ Lyrics: Kaka Mallwal
🎬 Director: Mehraaj Singh
✂️ Editor: Jeet Rowdy
🎥 Presentation: Lucky Manila & Kuldeep Rasila

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

💥 Every struggle creates a stronger person.
💥 Every pain has a story.
💥 Every dream needs sacrifice.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

REAL STRUGGLE – A song from the heart ❤️
If you enjoyed this song then don’t forget to:
👍 Like
💬 Comment
📢 Share
🔔 Subscribe for more Punjabi songs & videos

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

snippet.title: Made in India: A Titan Story - Official Trailer | Naseeruddin Shah, Jim Sarbh | Amazon MX Player
snippet.description:
Amazon MX Player presents 
Made In India: A Titan Story - Official Trailer 

Starring: Jim Sarbh, Naseeruddin Shah, Vaibhav Tatwawadi, Namita Dubey, Kaveri Seth, Lakshvir Saran
Production House: Almighty Motion Picture & T-Series Films
Produced By: Prabhleen Sandhu, Bhushan Kumar, Kishan Kumar
Written By: Karan Vyas
Directed By: Robbie Grewal
Genre: Biography

About Made In India: A Titan Story - 
Set in Pre-liberalised India, TITAN is “India’s First Start-up story” where India was at the cusp of an economic & social change. The show follows the journey of Xerxes Desai, who was tasked with reviving Tata Press but he ends up transforming the failing venture by pivoting to a totally new category, watches. Facing bureaucratic hurdles, market challenges, and personal sacrifices, Xerxes’ relentless pursuit of excellence and innovation culminates in the birth of iconic brands like Sonata and the revolutionary Titan Edge, eventually leading to his name becoming the gold standard of Indian ingenuity & resilience. 

About Amazon MX Player -
Amazon MX Player is India’s leading free, premium, ad-supported streaming entertainment platform, offering a massive library of trending web series, reality shows, movies, and international content — all FREE to watch. From youth hits and binge-worthy dramas to reality competition shows, Amazon MX Player is home to some of India’s most popular titles including Hip Hop India, Case Toh Banta Hai, Playground, Battleground, Crushed, Gutar Gu, Rise and Fall, Sisterhood, Campus Beats, First Copy, Pyar Ka Professor, Jamnapaar, I-Popstar, Aukaat Ke Bahar and many more. Love international content? Explore MX Vdesi, featuring top global shows dubbed in Hindi, Tamil, and Telugu—including fan-favourites like Our Secret, Gen Z, Time To Fall In Love, W: Two Worlds Apart, My Deskmate, and more! With new shows dropping regularly across genres like romance, action, comedy, crime, thriller, K-drama, youth drama, and reality entertainment — there’s always something exciting to stream.

Explore MX Vdesi, featuring top global shows dubbed in Hindi, Tamil, and Telugu—including fan-favourites like Our Secret, Gen Z, Time To Fall In Love, W: Two Worlds Apart, My Deskmate, and more! With new shows dropping regularly across genres like romance, action, comedy, crime, thriller, K-drama, youth drama, and reality entertainment — there’s always something exciting to stream.

snippet.description:
Zamane mein kahin chahega nahin… meri tarah koi #Tujhko 🤍 

#arijitsingh #sunidhichauhan 

🎧 Listen On:

Reels - https://www.instagram.com/reels/audio/2464772660612736?igsh=MW5tOGcydXBid3RndA==

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
🎧  Audio Credits

➟ Featuring: Shahid Kapoor and Rashmika Mandanna 
➟ Music Label : Universal Music India and Mad For Mussic 
➟ Singer : Arijit Singh and Sunidhi Chauhan
➟ Music Composer: Pritam Chakraborty 
➟ Lyrics : Amitabh Bhattacharya

➟Studio Assistants - Khush Jaggi, Ameya Dayal, Sagnik Mukherjee
➟Studio Intern - Anushree Amod
➟Backing Vocal Design - Aniruddh Anantha, Aarvan
➟Backing Vocals - Thomson Andrews, Arun Kamath
➟Chorus - Aniruddh Anantha, Aarvan, Akash Mukherjee, Ameya Dayal
➟Mixing Assistants to Shadab - Jazbaat, Sohamm, Suryansh
➟Recording Engineers at Arijit Singh’s Studio - Ritvik Shah, Sukanto Singha

Musicians :-
➟Live Acoustic Guitar : Arijit Singh, John Paul, Saswata Das
➟Live Electric Guitar & Bass : John Paul

Dinesh Vijan & Luv Ranjan presents #Cocktail2​, releasing in cinemas on 19th June, 2026

A Maddock Films & Luv Films Production

🎬 Video Credits

➟ Cast: Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon, Rashmika Mandanna 
➟ Directed By: Homi Adajania 
➟ Produced By: Dinesh Vijan, Luv Ranjan and Ankur Garg
➟ Written By: Tarun Jain and Luv Ranjan
➟ Co-Producers: Sharada Karki Jalota, Pooja Prem Patheja

➟ Director of Photography: Santhana Krishnan Ravichandran
➟ Original Song and Background Score: Pritam Chakraborty   
➟ Costume Designer: Anaita Shroff Adajania 
➟ Director of Choreography: Vijay A. Ganguly
➟ Publicity Design: Himanshu  & Rahul Nanda (H-one)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Lyrics:

Jeene ki hai tu hi vajah
Jeena tere liye
Main kya kahun ke yaar tu
Hai Kya Mere Liye

Zamane me kahin
Meri tarah kabhi
Chahega na koi
Tujhko

Jaise maine diya
Vaise poori tarah
Dil dega na koi
Tujhko

Tujhko..
Jab Se Mila..
Tujhko..

Tujhko..
Maana Jahan..
Tujhko..

Subah ki saari furtiyan
Bekhudi har shaam ki
Na ho tere saath mein
Toh meri kis kaam ki

Uthe jo mera har qadam
Tere sang shuruat me
Haath daale Haath me
Fiqr kya anjaam ki

Mujh mein zyaada ab tu hi hai
Jitna main hoon voh kyun hi hai
Kuch aisa kar main dhoondhoon bhi toh
Paun na khudh ko..

Tu hi toh aasman
Tu hi meri zameen 
Maana hai Zindagi
Tujhko..

Bin maange har dua
Poori hui meri
Paaya jo humnasheen
Tujhko..

Tujhko..
Jab se mila..
Tujhko..

Tujhko..
Maana jahan..
Tujhko..

Tujhko..

Galatiyan bhi teri
Main gawara karun
Ye khata hi sahi, par dobara karun

Kya karun sarphira
Ishq hi hai mera
Izhaar ka yahi tareeqa hai mera..

Aankhon ki hai tu raushni
Tu hi toh khaab hai
Main hoon agar savaal toh
Tu hi jawaab hai..


© 2026 Universal Music India Pvt. Ltd., Under Exclusive License from Mad for Mussic

snippet.title: Tu Bewafa Hai – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe
snippet.description:
Tu Bewafa Hai – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe


---


Tu bewafa hai…
ye baat ab
dil ko samajh aa gayi.

Jise humne
apni duniya maana…
usi ne
hume tanha chhod diya.

Mohabbat sachchi thi meri…
par tera saath
sirf ek jhootha ehsaas nikla.

“Tu Bewafa Hai”
ek aise dil ki kahani hai
jo pyaar mein
toot kar bhi
sirf wafa karta raha.

Is gaane mein
dard bhi hai,
bewafai bhi,
aur ek gehra ehsaas bhi
jo dheere se kehta hai —

humne dil diya tha…
tumne dard de diya…

Agar aapne bhi
kabhi kisi se
beinteha mohabbat ki ho
aur badle mein bewafai mili ho,
to ye gaana
aapke dil ko chhoo jaayega.

🎙️ Voice: Aarzoo Khaan
🎧 Vibe: Emotional • Deep • Heartbreak • Soulful (Arijit Singh Vibe)

snippet.title: Shakira, Burna Boy - Dai Dai (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Shakira, Burna Boy - Dai Dai (Official Video)
FIFA World Cup Official Song 2026

Music: https://songwhip.com/shakira/dai-dai

Letra/Lyrics: 
Oe oe e oe Oe oe e oe
You knew from the day you were born
That here in this place you belong
You been this brave all along
What broke you once made you strong

Dai dai iko
Dale allez lets go
Dai dai iko
Dale allez lets go!
Dai dai iko
Dale allez lets go
Dai dai iko
Dale allez lets go!

Come follow your desire
Theres a will there way
You are the owner of that fire
No one can take it away
Sweat and blood to write your story
That is how you paved the way
You are about to reach the glory
Only one step away

All the highs and lows
All the tears and the pain
You been there thru it all
Been thru it all
Just do it again
Now you got to believe (I believe)
Cuz you know what it takes
To be living the dream
At top of your game.

Feel it, got everything you needed
now bring it like you mean it
just like you mean it
Dale, no olvides lo que vales
Juega como tu sabes
Como tu sabes.

Energy is contagious you know
And it never fails no no
No one’s getting tired I know
Cuz you got that fire eio
Dream a little higher
Lets go lets go lets go
We’ve taken all that our hearts can hold
We can’t hold on to the past no more
From the dirt and the tears you make gold
You are more than flesh and bone

All the tears and the pain
You been there thru it all

Just like you mean it

snippet.title: एकादशी भजन - ग्यारस उसी के घर में जावेगी, जहां लगा पेड़ तुलसी का | Ekadashi Bhajan | Gyaras Bhajan
snippet.description:
🌿✨ग्यारस उसी के घर में जावेगी, जहां लगा पेड़ तुलसी का | Ekadashi Bhajan | FINE DIGITAL HARYANVI✨🌿
(Gyaras Usi Ke Ghar Mein Javegi Jaha Laga Ped Tulsi Ka

🙏 प्रस्तुत है एक बेहद मधुर और भक्तिमय एकादशी भजन — “जहां लगा पेड़ तुलसी का”, जिसमें बताया गया है कि जहाँ तुलसी का पौधा होता है, वहाँ स्वयं लक्ष्मी जी, भगवान विष्णु और सभी देवी-देवताओं की कृपा बनी रहती है। यह भजन भक्ति, श्रद्धा और आध्यात्मिक शांति से भरपूर है।

Song Info :-
■ Title ▹Gyaras Usi Ke Ghar Me Javegi Jaha Laga Ped Tulsi Ka
■ Artist ▹ Ritu
■ Singer ▹ Kiran Negi
■ Music ▹ Kuldeep Mali Aala
■ Keyboard Player ▹ Sachin Kamal 
■ Lyrics & Composition ▹Traditional
■ Song Production Support ▹Rajesh Madina
■ Editing ▹Max Ranga
■ Cameraman ▹Gulshan Bawa
■ Label ▹Fine Digital Video
■ Copyright ▹Fine Digital Media

Special Thanks To All Team

🎶 इस भजन में आपको मिलेगा:
✨ तुलसी माता का महत्व
✨ एकादशी व्रत की महिमा
✨ भगवान विष्णु और लक्ष्मी जी की कृपा
✨ भक्ति रस में डूबा हुआ सुंदर कीर्तन

💚 अगर आपको यह भजन पसंद आए तो LIKE 👍 जरूर करें,
💬 COMMENT करके बताएं आपको कैसा लगा,
🔔 और चैनल FINE DIGITAL HARYANVI को SUBSCRIBE करना न भूलें नीचे दिए हुए लिंक पे
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UClwM5RNjqRRnAf1CGBEe_8g?sub_confirmation=1

📌 हर एकादशी पर ऐसे ही भक्ति भजन सुनने के लिए जुड़े रहें हमारे साथ।

🔔 जय श्री हरि 🙏 जय तुलसी माता 🌿

💥❤️ फुल रोमांस, शानदार म्यूजिक और जबरदस्त एंटरटेनमेंट के मजा लीं एके साथ ❤️🚀

snippet.title: Zaroori Tha (Music Video) Rahat Fateh Ali Khan | Gauahar Khan and Kushal Tandon | Back 2 Love
snippet.description:
Aaj hum lekar aaye hain ustad Rahat Fateh Ali Khan ka one of the most iconic and heartbreaking tracks "Zaroori Tha". Agar aapne kabhi sachha pyaar kiya hai aur us dard ko mehsoos kiya hai, toh yeh gaana seedha aapke dil ko chhoo jayega. 🥺💔

Featuring the amazing Gauahar Khan and Kushal Tandon, yeh video ek aisi adhuri love story bayaan karta hai jo aapko emotional kar degi. Rahat Sahab ki magical voice aur deep lyrics ka yeh combo sahi mein next level hai!

Aapko is gaane ka kaunsa part sabse best laga? Hamein Comments mein zaroor batayein! 👇

Credits:
Performed by Rahat Fateh Ali Khan
Written by Khalil ur Rehman, Sahir Ali Bagga
Produced by Rahat Fateh Ali KhanSalman Ahmed

(C) 2014 Universal Music India Pvt. Ltd.

en-US.description:
Today, we bring you one of the most iconic and heartbreaking tracks from maestro Rahat Fateh Ali Khan, "Zaroori Tha." If you've ever experienced true love and felt the pain, this song will touch your heart. 🥺💔

Featuring the amazing Gauahar Khan and Kushal Tandon, this video narrates an incomplete love story that will leave you emotional. The combination of Rahat Sahab's magical voice and deep lyrics is truly next-level!

Which part of this song did you like best? Let us know in the comments! 👇

snippet.title: घर में चलाओ ये सुंदरकांड पाठ 🏡 सारी परेशानियां दूर होंगी | Full Path -Sampurn Sunderkand
snippet.description:
घर में चलाओ ये सुंदरकांड पाठ 🏡 सारी परेशानियां दूर होंगी | Full Path -Sampurn Sunderkand

Album :- Sampurn Sunderkand
Song :-  Sampurn Sunderkand
Singer :- Ravi Raj 
Lyrics :- Dinesh Railhan 
Music :- Railhan Studios 
Recording - Kailash Ji 
Makeup - Shivu Makeovers 
Director - Vivek Singh
Digital Partner : Lokdhun 
Label / Company :- Bhakti Dhaam 
VG - 44632

Spotify -  https://open.spotify.com/album/1rAHzMZye5CFjUII4NKB5l
Instagram -    https://www.instagram.com/reels/audio/1218369780381010/
Gaana - https://gaana.com/song/sampurn-sunderkand-2688-7175
Jio Saavan - https://www.jiosaavn.com/song/sampurn-sunderkand/Oz4-SytYVn0
Apple - https://music.apple.com/in/album/sampurn-sunderkand/1876480389?i=1876480391
Amazon -  https://music.apple.com/in/album/sampurn-sunderkand/1876480389?i=1876480391
YT Music -  https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=meKYP8Q6aAY 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

सुन्दरकांड” – श्री राम चरित मानस का 5 वा अध्याय/कांड है। सुन्दर कांड (Sundar Kand) को सबसे पहले रामायण में श्री वाल्मीकि जी ने संस्कृत में लिखा था। बाद में तुलसी दस जी ने जब श्री राम चरित मानस लिखी, तो सुन्दर कांड का अवधी भाषा वाला रूप हम सब के सामने आया 
सुन्दरकाण्ड में हनुमान जी का सीता माता को खोजने के लिए की गयी लंका यात्रा का सम्पूर्ण मनमोहक बखान किया गया है।
सुन्दरकांड एक ऐसा भाग है जो सिर्फ हनुमान जी की वीरता का बखान करता है । सुन्दर कांड हनुमान जी पर केंद्रित सबसे पुरानी रचना है। ऐसा माना जाता है के सुन्दरकाण्ड के पाठ से सभी मनोकामनाएं पूर्ण होती हैं ।

सुन्दर कांड के फायदे | Benefits of - Sunder Kand
 यह कहा जाता है कि चालीस सप्ताह तक लगातार जो कोई श्रद्धापूर्वक Sundarkand का पाठ करता है, तो उसके सभी मनोरथ पूरे होते हैं तथा जीवन के सभी कष्ट, दुःख, परेशानियाँ दूर हो जाती हैँ । कई ज्योतिषी भी विपरित परिस्थितियों में सुंदरकांड करने की ही सलाह देते हैं। यदि किसी व्यक्ति के जीवन में अत्यधिक परेशानियां हो तथा कोई काम नहीं बन पा रहा है, आत्मविश्वास की कमी हो तो सुंदरकांड के पाठ से शुभ फल प्राप्त होता है।

Sunderkand, Sunderkand chaupai, sunderkand path, sunderkand full, sunderkand in hindi, सम्पूर्ण सुन्दरकाण्ड पाठ, Sampurn SunderKand, sunder kand, sunderkand ka path, sangeetmay sunderkand, sunderkand ramayan, Sunderkand fast, Sunderkand with lyrics, Sunder kand By Prem Parkash Dubey, Sunderkand live, Mangalwar Special, Kam samay main sunderkand, 45 min mein sunderkand, sunderkand in hindi, हनुमान जी का सुंदरकांड, रामायण का सुंदरकांड, संपूर्ण सुंदरकांड चौपाई, सुंदरकांड हिंदी में,सुंदरकांड डाउनलोड, Mangalwar special sunderkand, Tuesday special sunderkand, Tuesday speical, Sunderkand ka path kese karein, अब तक का सबसे कम समय मे गाया गया सम्पूर्ण सुन्दरकाण्ड पाठ, Sunderkand ki chaupaiya, sunderkand sunne ke labh,

सुन्दरकांड” – श्री राम चरित मानस का 5 वा अध्याय/कांड है। सुन्दर कांड (Sundar Kand) को सबसे पहले रामायण में श्री वाल्मीकि जी ने संस्कृत में लिखा था। बाद में तुलसी दस जी ने जब श्री राम चरित मानस लिखी, तो सुन्दर कांड का अवधी भाषा वाला रूप हम सब के सामने आया 
सुन्दरकाण्ड में हनुमान जी का सीता माता को खोजने के लिए की गयी लंका यात्रा का सम्पूर्ण मनमोहक बखान किया गया है।
सुन्दरकांड एक ऐसा भाग है जो सिर्फ हनुमान जी की वीरता का बखान करता है । सुन्दर कांड हनुमान जी पर केंद्रित सबसे पुरानी रचना है। ऐसा माना जाता है के सुन्दरकाण्ड के पाठ से सभी मनोकामनाएं पूर्ण होती हैं ।

सुन्दर कांड के फायदे | Benefits of - Sunder Kand
 यह कहा जाता है कि चालीस सप्ताह तक लगातार जो कोई श्रद्धापूर्वक Sundarkand का पाठ करता है, तो उसके सभी मनोरथ पूरे होते हैं तथा जीवन के सभी कष्ट, दुःख, परेशानियाँ दूर हो जाती हैँ । कई ज्योतिषी भी विपरित परिस्थितियों में सुंदरकांड करने की ही सलाह देते हैं। यदि किसी व्यक्ति के जीवन में अत्यधिक परेशानियां हो तथा कोई काम नहीं बन पा रहा है, आत्मविश्वास की कमी हो तो सुंदरकांड के पाठ से शुभ फल प्राप्त होता है।

snippet.title: GTA 5 | Franklin & Shinchan🥛President Loves Shinchan Milk! | Biggest Milk Contract
snippet.description:
Shinchan and Franklin are successfully selling Shinchan Milk in Los Santos! 🐄🥛
People love the milk because of its amazing quality and fresh taste! 😍
One day, the President’s security officers arrive with a special request — they need a full tanker of milk! 😱🚛
With Trevor’s help, Franklin and Shinchan prepare a huge milk tanker and go to meet the President. But there’s a problem... security guards stop them from entering! 🚫
Shinchan gets a crazy idea 💡
They change the tanker into a military-style vehicle and try again! 😎🔥
Will the President like Shinchan Milk?
Watch till the end to see what happens when Shinchan Milk becomes famous across Los Santos! 🚛🥛
🎮 GTA 5 Malayalam Story Video by GTA Mallu
💬 Created by Siva Ganesh
✨ Funny, exciting, and family-friendly GTA 5 story!

What starts as a fun day quickly turns into total chaos when the giant cow creates madness all over the city 😂 From funny moments to crazy chases, this adventure is packed with entertainment, action, and comedy!
Will Franklin and Shinchan be able to control the biggest cow in GTA 5? Or will Los Santos never be the same again? 🤯
🎮 GTA 5 Malayalam Story Video by POKKIRI YT 
💬  by Basith
✨ Funny, emotional, and exciting GTA 5 story perfect for kids and family viewers!

snippet.title: Franklin Opens Most HAUNTED Mystery Containers In Indian Bike Driving 3D! 😱
snippet.description:
#NessFitGamer #gta 5 #gta5hindi #gta5mods 

Franklin Opens Most HAUNTED Mystery Containers In Indian Bike Driving 3D! 😱

This video is about the Indian Bike Driving 3D game, this is a horror scary story about Mystery Container or Mystery Box In Indian Bike Driving 3D. In this scary story, Franklin meets many ghosts and monsters like Granny, Kamla, Choo Choo Charles, Ice Scream Rod, and Huggy Wuggy. To unlock his own mystery container in Indian Bike Driving 3D, Franklin must invite all these ghosts. Will Franklin survive this horror adventure? What is inside the mystery box of franklin of Indian Bike Driving 3D? Watch the full scary story to find out!

Instagram
https://www.instagram.com/nessfitgamer01?igsh=MTBudmpzZGdnZXljNg==

I hope you guys enjoyed this video if you did please consider to like the video and subscribe the channel. ❤️

Some 3D assets and mods are sourced from community modders and are used for fan-made cinematic purposes.
No ownership is claimed over any third-party assets.

Disclaimer:
This video is made using GTA 5, with Indian Bike Driving 3D assets added inside the game.

This is NOT actual gameplay of Indian Bike Driving 3D. Everything shown is custom-made using GTA mods. All characters and events shown in this video are fictional and created for entertainment purpose.
 

This is a fan-made, fictional, and transformative video that falls under Fair Use (Section 107) for commentary, parody, and storytelling.

Copyright Disclaimer under section 107 of the Copyright Act of 1976, allowance is made for “fair use” for purposes such as criticism, comment, news reporting, teaching, scholarship, education, and research.

Fair use is a use permitted by copyright statutes that might otherwise be infringing.

About : NessFit Gamer is a youtube channel, where you will find stories of gta 5 game in Hindi, I hope this video was entertaining and you like it, if you did smash the thumbs up button.

Indian Bike Driving 3D – Rohit Gaming Studios

snippet.title: Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe Official Video Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya #bollywood #hindisong #2026
snippet.description:
Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe (Official Video ) (Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya) || Romantic Bollywood Hits Song 2026
Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya 2.0 💞 90s Bollywood Romantic Vibe | Soulful New Version

Song - Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe


तेरे बिना सूना है जहाँ, तेरे बिना तन्हा है दिल,
तेरे बिना हर धड़कन में, बस गूँजता है तेरा सिलसिला।
तेरी यादों की चादर ओढ़े, हर रात गुज़र जाती है,
तेरी तस्वीर आँखों में, फिर भी आँखें भीग जाती हैं।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे होंठों की मुस्कान में, मैंने खुदा का नूर देखा,
तेरे आँचल की छाँव में, सारा सुकून देखा।
तेरी आवाज़ में वो मिठास है, जो साजों को जगा देती है,
तेरी खामोशी भी अब तो, मेरी रूह को सजा देती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी तेरी बातें याद आईं, तो दिल मुस्कुरा उठा,
कभी तेरी दूरी ने छू लिया, तो दिल बिखर उठा।
तेरे बिना जो जीना पड़ा, वो जीना ना रहा,
तेरे बिना हर लम्हा मेरा, अधूरा-सा रहा।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे जाने के बाद भी, तेरा एहसास रहता है,
हर शाम तेरी यादों का, साया पास रहता है।
तेरे ख़त के अक्षर अब भी, महकते हैं जैसे फूल,
तेरे नाम से ही चलती हैं, मेरी हर मंज़िल की धूल।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरी आँखों में जो गहराई है, उसमें मेरा जहाँ है,
तेरे इश्क़ की पनाहों में, मेरी पहचान है।
तेरी राहों में बिछ जाऊँ, अगर तू मुस्कुराए,
तेरी ख़ुशी में अपनी हर सांस, मैं कुर्बान कर जाऊँ।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी खामोशी में तेरा नाम लूँ, तो आँसू चल पड़ते हैं,
कभी तेरे ख़्वाबों में खो जाऊँ, तो लम्हे थम पड़ते हैं।
तेरे जाने के बाद भी, दिल तुझसे बातें करता है,
हर तन्हा रात में अब भी, तेरा ही ज़िक्र करता है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

अब बस इतना कह दूँ तुझसे, लौट आ किसी बहाने,
तेरे बिना ये दिल मेरा, टूटे पत्ते जैसा दीवाने।
तेरे प्यार में ही तो मेरी, दुनिया पूरी होती है,
तेरे आने से ही मेरी, ज़िंदगी रोशन होती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे बिना हर धड़कन में, बस गूँजता है तेरा सिलसिला।
तेरी यादों की चादर ओढ़े, हर रात गुज़र जाती है,
तेरी तस्वीर आँखों में, फिर भी आँखें भीग जाती हैं।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे होंठों की मुस्कान में, मैंने खुदा का नूर देखा,
तेरे आँचल की छाँव में, सारा सुकून देखा।
तेरी आवाज़ में वो मिठास है, जो साजों को जगा देती है,
तेरी खामोशी भी अब तो, मेरी रूह को सजा देती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी तेरी बातें याद आईं, तो दिल मुस्कुरा उठा,
कभी तेरी दूरी ने छू लिया, तो दिल बिखर उठा।
तेरे बिना जो जीना पड़ा, वो जीना ना रहा,
तेरे बिना हर लम्हा मेरा, अधूरा-सा रहा।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे जाने के बाद भी, तेरा एहसास रहता है,
हर शाम तेरी यादों का, साया पास रहता है।
तेरे ख़त के अक्षर अब भी, महकते हैं जैसे फूल,
तेरे नाम से ही चलती हैं, मेरी हर मंज़िल की धूल।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरी आँखों में जो गहराई है, उसमें मेरा जहाँ है,
तेरे इश्क़ की पनाहों में, मेरी पहचान है।
तेरी राहों में बिछ जाऊँ, अगर तू मुस्कुराए,
तेरी ख़ुशी में अपनी हर सांस, मैं कुर्बान कर जाऊँ।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी खामोशी में तेरा नाम लूँ, तो आँसू चल पड़ते हैं,
कभी तेरे ख़्वाबों में खो जाऊँ, तो लम्हे थम पड़ते हैं।
तेरे जाने के बाद भी, दिल तुझसे बातें करता है,
हर तन्हा रात में अब भी, तेरा ही ज़िक्र करता है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

अब बस इतना कह दूँ तुझसे, लौट आ किसी बहाने,
तेरे बिना ये दिल मेरा, टूटे पत्ते जैसा दीवाने।
तेरे प्यार में ही तो मेरी, दुनिया पूरी होती है,
तेरे आने से ही मेरी, ज़िंदगी रोशन होती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

snippet.title: మంగళవారం స్పెషల్ హనుమాన్ సాంగ్స్ 🙏 | Kondagattu Anjanna Folk Songs Telugu | Powerful Hanuman Songs
snippet.description:
మంగళవారం స్పెషల్ హనుమాన్ సాంగ్స్ 🙏 | Kondagattu Anjanna Folk Songs Telugu | Powerful Hanuman Songs


Listen to Tuesday Special Hanuman Songs 🙏 featuring powerful Kondagattu Anjanna Folk Songs. These energetic Telugu devotional songs dedicated to Sri Anjaneya Swamy (Lord Hanuman) bring strength, positivity, and divine protection.

Kondagattu Anjanna Swamy is widely worshipped for removing obstacles and blessing devotees with courage, success, and peace. These folk-style bhakti songs create a spiritual atmosphere and help you connect deeply with Lord Hanuman.


#HanumanSongs #KondagattuAnjanna #TeluguFolkSongs #TuesdaySpecialSongs

snippet.title: Kulfi Walu ( कुल्फी वालू )Adivasi New Song 2026 | Gulatya Song | Adivasi Comedy Song| Cd Group Music
snippet.description:
Kulfi Walu ( कुल्फी वालू )Adivasi New Song 2026 | Gulatya Song | Adivasi Comedy Song| Cd Group Music
________________________________________________
कुल्फीवालू” सिर्फ एक गाना नहीं, प्यार ❤️, दोस्ती 🤝, कॉमेडी 😄 और इमोशन्स 🥺 का पूरा मजेदार सफर है।
इस गाने में मस्ती के साथ एक अच्छा मैसेज भी छुपा है — दारू जिंदगी और रिश्तों दोनों को खराब कर सकती है।
पूरा वीडियो देखें और बताएं आपको सबसे ज्यादा कौन सा सीन पसंद 
आया। 🔥🎬
________________________________________________

➤ Presents by: C D Group Music
➤ Story Song Title: Kulfi Walu 
➤ Video Director: Mayur Singh Chauhan 
Assistant director : ramasingh bamne
➤ Action Director: Mayur Singh Chauhan
Assistant Action director : ramasingh bamne
➤ Choreographer: Mayur Singh Chauhan
➤ Featuring: Vicky Barela, Vinzza Barde , Akky Babole ,Amar patel , Sk Sarkar , Mukesh Senani , Sawan Arya,Ram Senani, Saksham Chouhan , Abhishek Solanki, Pradeep bardey
➤ Singers: Ajay Mujalde, Heena Dawar 
➤ Lyrics: Ajay Mujalde 
➤ Music composer : Ritesh Kirade 
➤ Music Mix Mastering: Ritesh Kirade
➤ Recording Studio: Shanti Recording Studio Jogwada
➤ Rhythm: Ritesh Kirade
➤ DOP: Pradeep Bardey 
➤ DOP Assistant: Team Sakshamm Chouhan 
➤ Camera : Dhanilaal Kirade
➤ Video Editing Rohit Vaishanki ( Aadiwood )
➤ Make-up Artist: 
➤ Costume Designer: 
➤ Digital Partner: Agesh Solanki (Adivasi Media)
➤ Channel Manager: Agesh Solanki
➤ Music Label: C D Group Music
➤ Group Members (Female): Jyoti Bhargo , Punam kirade ,
➤ Group Members (Male): Yuvi - Kuldeep
➤ Management Team: Ramasing Bamane, Bamane, Arjun Singh Solanki,Ram Senani, Aadiwood Family & AVP Family
➤ Special Thanks: (Aadiwood Family), (AVP Family), (C D Group Family),Rohit Vaishaki, Arjoon Singh Solanki ,Agesh Solanki, Mukesh Pawara, Ramasing Bamane, Aashu Bamane, Mayur Singh Chouhan, Karan Soalnki, Koushal Senani,
➤ Based on: This song is a tribute to the everyday lives, hard work, and deep-rooted traditions of India’s tribal communities

snippet.title: High Court (Official Video) | Diler Kharkiya New Song | Fiza Choudhary | New Haryanvi song 2026
snippet.description:
High Court (Official Video) Diler Kharkiya | Fiza Choudhary | New Haryanvi Song 2026
यह एक नया संगीत वीडियो है जिसमें एक महिला नाचती और गाती हुई दिखाई देती है। यह एक हिंदी song है जिसमें एक रोमांटिक Haryanvi song का अनुभव मिलता है। वीडियो में एक जोड़े को बातचीत करते हुए और अन्य लोगों को रंगीन पृष्ठभूमि में नाचते हुए देखा जा सकता है, जो इसे एक trending song बनाता है।

#newharyanvisong #haryanvisong #haryanvi #haryanvidance #haryanvidjsong #newharyanvisongsharyanavi2026 #newharyanvisong2026
#highcourt #highcourtsong #nasnaskyudukhei #newsong #foryou 
#highcourtkivakilmerifriendhogai #highcourtkivakilmerifanhogayi #djsong  #highcourtdjsong #highcourtnewsong #courtmeingoli #courtmeingolimarengemerijaan diler kharkiya new song,diler kharkiya song,diler kharkiya,80 lakh,80 lakh song,80 lakh new song,kunsa thara kaam chale,konsa thara kam chle

Song Credits :-

Song - High Court
Singer / Composer - Diler Kharkiya
Lyrics - Basant Mundi
Starring - Diler Kharkiya , Fiza Chaudhary
Music / Mix & Master - Jaizeey Music
Supervision & Keys - Sahil Raahi
Producer - Kehar Kharkiya
Video - Amit Bishnoi 
Dop - Vishal Godara
Blessing - Shri Rajender Singh ji Kharkiya
Reels Promotion - Sachin Chaudhary & Kehar Kharkiya ( GM Hood )
Online And Youtube Promotion - M Soni ( Sirsa )

LOVE !! LIKE !! COMMENTS !! SUBSCRIBE

Song Lyrics:
Kondsa thara kaam chale, jo saath me poora gaam chale

Shehar ke bacche fan thare, jab muh pe Ram ka naam chale
Aa jahaj chale aur byaaj chale, mhare gaama ka riwaaj chale

Saari bande gel bawli, 80 lakh ke jahaj chale
Are poora circle yaaron ka, jisme bhai-bhai hoti hai

Sircode ve bande hai, jinse thari gel ladaai hoti hai
O duniya hori fan bawli, khoob badaai hoya kare

Dushman aape ban jaave, jab jaan chadhaai hoya kare
Are baaj chale, swaraj chale, re feto jinka khaaj chale

Vaidh badya badmasha ka, tu karta gel ilaaj chale
Aa jahaj chale aur byaaj chale, mhare gaama ka riwaaj chale

Saari bande gel bawli, 80 lakh ke jahaj chale
Robin Hood si chhavi thari, manne suni saare gaama me

Thare theke se Dabwali me, aur site se Gurgaama me
Aa Panchkula aur Mahendragarh tak, kaam nahi se rukan ka

Dum rakhe se chhora tere, upar khokha fookan ka
Saaj chale, awaaz chale, kaala diggal ka raaj chale

Deep Laath tere gaane te, teri basai ne hota naaz chale
Aa jahaj chale aur byaaj chale, mhare gaama ka riwaaj chale

Saari bande gel bawli, 80 lakh ke jahaj chale

snippet.title: O Firki Wali Tu Kal fir aja | 90's Bollywood Style Romantic Song | Hindi Love Song 2026
snippet.description:
#HindiSong #RomanticSong #SadSong
O Firki Wali Tu Kal Aaja ❤️ | 90's Bollywood Style Romantic Song | Hindi Love Song 2026

O Firki Wali ek heart touching Hindi romantic song hai jo 90's Bollywood ke retro vibes aur emotional love story ko capture karta hai. Yeh gaana un sab ke liye hai jo sachche pyaar, yaadein aur judai ko mehsoos karte hain.

Isme aapko milega:
• Retro Bollywood feel 🎞️
• Emotional aur soulful lyrics 💔
• Soft melody jo dil ko chhoo jaaye 🎶
• Old is gold style romantic vibe ✨

Agar aapko 90's Bollywood songs, sad love songs, aur Hindi romantic music pasand hai, to yeh gaana aapke playlist me zaroor hona chahiye.

🎧 Best experience ke liye headphones use karein

👉 Like 👍 | Share 🔄 | Subscribe 🔔 zaroor karein
👉 Comment me batayein aapko yeh gaana kaisa laga ❤️

snippet.title: Update! Heroes Unlock Earlier, Extra Builder and Gold Pass Changes!
snippet.description:
A New Clash of Clans Update brings Heroes at Town Hall 4, Gold Pass Changes, Re-engagement Improvements and an Extra Builder for the Builder Base. Judo Sloth Gaming breaks down the full update details which is certainly a different one; this is a mandatory update but clearly tailored towards new and returning players. We know an Update is coming in June, and there has been a hint towards Global Chat as well as Ore improvements, such as from Hero Upgrades. Let me know what you think of this one though. Clash On!

Second Channel ► https://www.youtube.com/@JudoSloth.2

snippet.description:
Presenting New Gujarati Sad Song 2026 “Dil Ma Aag Lagadi” 💔🥹❤️‍🩹
A heart-touching song filled with emotions, pain, love & heartbreak. Sung beautifully by Kajal Maheriya ✨

Song Details: 
Song Name : Dil Ma Aag Lagadi
Singer : Kajal Maheriya
Lyrics : Darshan Bazigar
Music : DJ KWID,Gaurav Dhola
Artists : Dhaval Goswami,Viyona Patil,Shivani Rajput
Concept & Project By Pushpak Bhimani
Production House : Bloom Enterprise
Director : Pranav Jethva (JP)
D.O.P : Bhavdip Desai
Edit – D.I : Ashu Hir
Assistant Director : Pinakin Rathod
Makeup : Pannaben Solanki
Production Manager : Reshma Suthar
Art Director : Hardik Gohil
Bridal Costume By Jeeja Gj-5 Fashion (Vadaj)
Thanks : Chirag Ghevariya 
Music Label: T-Series

snippet.title: Nagan Si Lugai Tera Balam Chota (Official Video) Farmani Naaz | New haryanvi Song | Hema| Naaz Music
snippet.description:
#NaganSiLugai #farmaninaaz i #terabalamchota #Naazmusic 

Song  - Nagan Si Lugai | नागन सी लुगाई 
Artist   -  Hema Chaudhary.Rahul Mulheda , Varunesh Baisla
Lyrics  - varunesh baisla , Anuj Mulheda 
Music - Gaurav Panchal (Gr Music -8708626865)
Singer - Farmani Naaz , Manish Tyagi 
Video Shoot - Panchal Productions
Director -  Rahul Mulheda , Nitin Panchal 
Editor - Nitin Panchal 
Publicity Design - Rahul mulheda
Publisher - Naaz Music
Label -   Naaz Music
Production - Rahul Mulheda
Special Thanks - Naaz Music And Team
For any query:- Email - farmaninaaz786@gmail.com

                 Lyrics
Mhare khat khatoli ka na tota
ra mahre khat khatoli ka na tota

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 

Lakh lakh ke shut ma phru
Sava lakh ki jutti re

Chandi ka mera vir al nada
Delhi ke ma kotti re

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 

Up ke ma dunga maru halle delhi sari ri
Dur dur ta nigah gadave rande cheel juhari ri

Love you bhabhi

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 

do balka ki ma bngi ma lagu kati kavari si 
Dhunge mere jholl marre

Chotti nag bnari ri
Bin hi bja du kya

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri


म्हारे खाट खटोली का ना टोटा
र म्हारे खाट खटोली का ना टोटा 

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 

लाख लाख के सूट मै पहरू सवा लाख की जूती रे
चांदी का मेरा वायरल नाड़ा दिल्ली के मै कोठी र

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 

यूपी के मै ढुंगा मारू हाले दिल्ली सारी री
दूर दूर त निगाह गड़ावे रांडे छेल जुहारी री
लव यू भाभी

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 

दो बालका की मां बनगी मै लागू कती कवारी सी
ढुंगे मेरे झोल मार र चोटी नाग बनारी री
बीन ही बजा दू क्या

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री

* Hanuman Tamil Devotional Songs: Feel the strength and devotion of Lord Hanuman.
* Amman Tamil Devotional Songs: Honor the divine mother in her various forms.
* Saibaba Tamil Devotional Songs: Seek the blessings of Shirdi Sai Baba.

* Lakshmi Tamil Devotional Songs: Attract prosperity with hymns for Goddess Lakshmi.
* Devi Tamil Devotional Songs: Praise the supreme goddess Devi in her many avatars.
* Ganesh Tamil Devotional Songs: Start your day with prayers to Lord Ganesha.

Special Occasions and Deities:
* Amavasai Tamil Devotional Songs: Songs for the new moon day rituals.
* Pradosham Tamil Devotional Songs: Hymns for the auspicious Pradosham period.
* Ashta Lakshmi Tamil Devotional Songs: Songs dedicated to the eight forms of Goddess Lakshmi.
* Vinayagar Tamil Devotional Songs: Devotions for the remover of obstacles, Lord Vinayagar.
* Ganapathi Tamil Devotional Songs: Invoke blessings from Lord Ganapathi.
* Surya Tamil Devotional Songs: Worship the Sun God, Surya, with these melodies.
* Sani Tamil Devotional Songs: Appease Lord Sani with these devotional tracks.
* Guru Tamil Devotional Songs: Songs to honor Guru and seek his wisdom.
* Perumal Tamil Devotional Songs: Devote to Lord Perumal with these spiritual songs.
* Navagraha Tamil Devotional Songs: Balance your energies with songs for the nine planets.

Subscribe now and join our spiritual journey. Like, share, and hit the bell icon to stay updated with our latest devotional uploads. May these divine songs bring peace, prosperity, and positivity to your life.

snippet.title: dimple simple recipes  is live कब्ज गैस एसिडिटी तीनों चीजों को खत्म करें घर की आयुर्वेदिक चीजों से
snippet.description:
🍽 Welcome to Dimple Simple Recipes! | डिम्पल सिंपल रेसिपीज़ में आपका स्वागत है! 🍽

🔥 Do you love cooking? / क्या आपको खाना बनाना पसंद है?
Then you’re at the perfect place! 🌿 Join me as I cook pure vegetarian recipes that are simple, tasty, and full of flavor — live and step by step! 👩‍🍳

👩‍🍳 What You’ll Find Here | यहाँ आपको मिलेगा:

✅ हर तरह के व्यंजन – भारतीय (उत्तर भारतीय, दक्षिण भारतीय, राजस्थानी, पंजाबी) और अंतरराष्ट्रीय (चाइनीज़, मैक्सिकन, इटालियन, थाई, कॉन्टिनेंटल)
✅ स्ट्रीट फूड, चाट, ढाबा और रेस्टोरेंट-स्टाइल रेसिपीज़
✅ पारंपरिक, देसी, ऑथेंटिक और फ्यूजन रेसिपीज़
✅ झटपट और आसान रेसिपीज़ – टिफिन, स्नैक्स, मिठाइयाँ, बेकिंग और हेल्दी फूड
✅ LIVE Cooking Videos – हर स्टेप को लाइव देखें, साथ में कुक करें और सवाल पूछें!
✅ Shorts, Tips, Training & Secret Cooking Tricks जो आपकी कुकिंग को और भी मजेदार बनाएँ!

📲 Follow for More Delicious Updates!
👉 Instagram: [Add your handle here]

💬 Like, Share & Subscribe!
Let’s make cooking simple, exciting, and full of flavor together! 🎉👩‍🍳👨‍🍳 #DimpleSimpleRecipes #PureVeg #LiveCooking #IndianFood #StreetFood #HomeCooking #FoodLover #EasyRecipes #VegetarianRecipes #CookingTips#

✅ पारंपरिक, देसी, ऑथेंटिक और फ्यूजन रेसिपीज़
✅ झटपट और आसान रेसिपीज़ – टिफिन, स्नैक्स, मिठाइयाँ, बेकिंग और हेल्दी फूड
✅ LIVE Cooking Videos – हर स्टेप को लाइव देखें, साथ में कुक करें और सवाल पूछें!
✅ Shorts, Tips, Training & Secret Cooking Tricks जो आपकी कुकिंग को और भी मजेदार बनाएँ!

snippet.title: LIVE Now: प्रेमानंद जी महाराज का आज का प्रवचन | 📅 26 मई 2026
snippet.description:
🔴 LIVE: पूज्य Premanand Ji Maharaj का दिव्य प्रवचन
| भक्ति • प्रेम • आत्मिक जागरण |

📅 26 मई 2026 (मंगलवार) | IST
📍 Vrindavan Prem Ras Channel

🌸 “जिस क्षण मन भगवान के चरणों में टिक जाता है, उसी क्षण जीवन की अशांति समाप्त होने लगती है।” 🌸

🙏 क्या आपका मन बार-बार भटकता है?
🙏 क्या आप भीतर की सच्ची शांति और आनंद की खोज में हैं?

✨ आज का यह दिव्य सत्संग आपके जीवन में एक नया मोड़ ला सकता है…

आइए, इस LIVE प्रवचन से जुड़ें और अनुभव करें उस भक्ति की शक्ति को,
जो न केवल मन को शांत करती है, बल्कि जीवन को नई दिशा देती है।

🌼 आज के प्रवचन में विशेष:

🔹 मन को स्थिर और एकाग्र करने का सरल उपाय
🔹 दुख और संघर्ष के बीच भी भक्ति कैसे जीवित रखें
🔹 नाम-स्मरण की गहराई और उसका वास्तविक प्रभाव

🌟 LIVE प्रवचन की विशेषताएँ:

✅ जीवन की उलझनों का आध्यात्मिक समाधान
✅ मधुर वाणी जो सीधे हृदय को स्पर्श करे
✅ भक्ति मार्ग पर आगे बढ़ने की सहज प्रेरणा

📡 LIVE आज ही:
🗓️ 26 मई 2026 (मंगलवार) | IST

🔔 अभी जुड़ें और Subscribe करें:
👉 @VrindavanPremRas-ql7yf

💬 अपने प्रश्न Comment में लिखें —
संभव है आज ही समाधान मिल जाए।

📌 याद रखें:
👍 LIKE करें
📤 SHARE करें
🔔 SUBSCRIBE करें

➡️ #LivePravachan
➡️ #Bhakti
➡️ #Vrindavan
➡️ #Spirituality
